data.text: I’m checking the Axon backend code and the relevant tests first, then I’ll decide whether this bead is small enough to implement directly or too large for the depth cap.

I’ve confirmed the backend still has a local JSONL fallback path. Next I’m reading the remainder of the Axon implementation and the tests to see whether this is a targeted fix or a broader backend rewrite.

The current code already contains a GraphQL transport branch, so this may be a verification-and-fix pass rather than a full implementation. I’m running the targeted Axon tests next and checking whether any failures point to a specific missing behavior.
